name: Essential Network Settings and Tasks in Windows - Microsoft Support
snippet:
Go to Network & internet Wifi settings > Airplane mode, then select the toggle for On or Off. Note Airplane mode retains the settings you used last time.
Select the Start WindowsLogo > Settings. Right-click the Network Ethernet or Wi-Fi Wifi icon on the taskbar, then select Network and internet settings.
